creator: frank@harz2014.behrens.de
text:
Maintainer update of port dns/zkt to version 1.1.2_1

1. Handle removed bind in FreeBSD-HEAD and FreeBSD-10, dns/zkt depends on dns/bin99 port in these cases.
   That fixes an error on the FreeBSD package build server.
2. Support staging.
3. Support LICENSE framework.

changed files:	Makefile
new files:	pkg-plist
